keyword_additions_pending.status: proposed — apply after 5 live runs confirm patterns

live_run_log.notes: All three schema issues fixed. Escalation_potential now differentiated (0.3–0.85). Actor/org types all correct — Hezbollah:militia, Naim Qassem:rebel_leader, Federal Reserve:financial_institution. Titles complete and wire-service style. Human review rate dropped from 50% (v1) to 31% (v2). Cache hit 75% (3/4 batches hit). SCMP source producing quality events (4/4 articles yielded events). Issue: same event extracted from multiple sources in different batches — Hormuz appears 3x, Sarmat 2x. Needs memory-agent to resolve cross-event merging.

First live run. Extraordinary geopolitical context (active US-Iran war, Hormuz blockade narrative) explains high human review rate. Schema issues: escalation_potential defaults to 0.5, actor_type/org_type all 'unknown', title truncation on event 7717543f.

schema_issues_pending.issue: Defaults to 0.5 across all events — model not reasoning about this field
schema_issues_pending.action: Add explicit scoring guidance to extraction prompt, or deprecate field

schema_issues_pending.issue: 'unknown' on all actors — enum values not defined in prompt
schema_issues_pending.action: Add enum values (government_official, military, diplomat, etc.) to extraction tool schema

schema_issues_pending.issue: Truncated mid-word on event 7717543f (~185 chars) — possible length cap
schema_issues_pending.action: Check schema max length; ensure prompt does not impose implicit cut

human_review_rate.note: Runs #6 and #7 both 0%. Overall v2 rate: 11/37 = 30% but noisy by batch composition

event_merge_rate.note: Same-day dedup working consistently. 0 bad merges across 12 dedup operations.
